record.field:
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Odoo_InsumoCargado]( [Insumo_Neodata] [nvarchar](50) NULL, [Descripcion_Neodata] [nvarchar](100) NULL, [Nombre_Odoo] [nvarchar](100) NULL, [RefInterna_Odoo] [nvarchar](100) NULL ) ON [PRIMARY]
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Odoo_Insumos]( [Nombre] [nvarchar](200) NULL, [RefInterna] [nvarchar](50) NULL, [CodNeodata] [nvarchar](50) NULL, [Comprar] [nvarchar](10) NULL, [Vender] [nvarchar](10) NULL, [TipoProd] [nvarchar](50) NULL, [TipoRec] [nvarchar](50) NULL, [UoM] [nvarchar](50) NULL, [Categoria] [nvarchar](200) NULL, [Kit] [nvarchar](10) NULL ) ON [PRIMARY]
SELECT P.PARTIDA, CASE LEN(RTRIM(P.Partida)) WHEN 1 THEN '' WHEN 3 THEN LEFT(P.Partida,1) WHEN 6 THEN LEFT(P.Partida,3) WHEN 10 THEN LEFT(P.Partida,6) WHEN 13 THEN LEFT(P.Partida,10) ELSE '' END AS PADRE, CASE Acepta_Mov WHEN 0 THEN 'CAPITULO' ELSE 'PARTIDA' END AS NAT, '' AS UNIDAD, Descripcion AS [DESCRIPCION DE PARTIDA], '' AS MEDICION, '' AS PRECIO, '' AS IMPORTE FROM AoPartidas AS P WHERE P.idProyecto=11 AND LEN(RTRIM(P.Partida)) IN (1,3,6,10,13) UNION ( SELECT IC.RefInterna_Odoo COLLATE Latin1_General_CI_AI AS PARTIDA, P.Partida AS PADRE, CASE LEFT(OI.Categoria,3) WHEN 'MAT' THEN 'Materiales' WHEN 'EQU' THEN 'Equipos' WHEN 'SUB' THEN 'Mano de Obra' WHEN 'SER' THEN 'Administrativo' WHEN 'KIT' THEN 'Materiales' ELSE 'NO Asignada' END AS NAT, OI.UoM COLLATE Latin1_General_CI_AI AS UNIDAD, IC.Nombre_Odoo COLLATE Latin1_General_CI_AI AS DESCRIPCION, PC.CantidadOriginal AS MEDICION, PC.CostoGlobalActual AS PRECIO, PC.CantidadOriginal*PC.CostoGlobalActual AS IMPORTE FROM AoPartidas AS P INNER JOIN AoPresupuestoControl AS PC ON P.IdProyecto=PC.IdProyecto AND P.IdPartida=PC.IdPartida INNER JOIN AoCatConceptos AS C ON C.IdProyecto=P.IdProyecto AND PC.idConcepto=C.idConcepto INNER JOIN AcCatInsumos AS I ON I.idInsumo = C.idSubcontrato LEFT OUTER JOIN NEO_APPS.dbo.Odoo_InsumoCargado AS IC ON IC.Insumo_Neodata COLLATE Latin1_General_CI_AI =I.Insumo LEFT OUTER JOIN NEO_APPS.dbo.Odoo_Insumos AS OI ON OI.RefInterna=IC.RefInterna_Odoo WHERE P.idProyecto=11 ) ORDER BY PARTIDA
